comment.body: I dont think you did it just looks like the probability distribution still favors buyers on the daily and her job is to just give us the important pivots to look for not tell the future so you have to be adapatable in my opinion not just be stuck in one mindset. Today we opened above centroid and holding the ES pivots for now.  So in this case you wouldnt blindly follow the weekly, you would add the recent notes and price action in mind and only make moves when you get confirmation. Even this dip we had is relatively small like you didnt miss anything buyers seem to be in control
comment.raw_body: I dont think you did it just looks like the probability distribution still favors buyers on the daily and her job is to just give us the important pivots to look for not tell the future so you have to be adapatable in my opinion not just be stuck in one mindset. comment.body: Alma return to wrap my head around the bullshit mental gymnastics this market throws out to keep it propped up.    So they went with good news is bad news this week expecting bad data and that would increase odds of rate cut.    They got surprised with good data but now are not going to let this drop?   They are pushing off as late spring long term risk and then gonna force CPI to be interpreted as expansionary which would then pump this again due to expansionary increasing rate cut odds?
